title: Franklin Titus
text: Home * People * Franklin Titus Franklin Titus (kingliveson) [1] , a computer chess aficionado and programmer, opening book author , expert of the Ippolit family of engines, hosting RobboLito and IvanHoe sources and executables, as well as various endgame tablebases and opening books [2] [3] . Franklin Titus was early critic of Robert Houdart concerning Houdini and its apparent RobboLito origins [4] . He was active poster in CCC until mid 2010, and since then in Jeremy Bernstein's OpenChess Forum .
